title: No Stack Limit
description: Removes the limit of 99 of max_stack_size
body:
# No Stack Limit
This mod removes the stack limit of 99 while using command:
/give @p item[max_stack_size=99]
With this mod, this value can be up to 2^32-2

### THIS MOD DOES NOT CHANGE ITEMS OBTAINED IN SURVIVAL MODE, IT ONLY REMOVES THE LIMIT OF THE max_stack_size COMPONENT

Players can hold **Left Alt** key while hovering on an item to see the exact count
